focus: Validation-completeness claims for feature catalog creation

evidenceSummary.summary: /create:feature-catalog completion reports root validation, link checks, and count checks without surfacing known per-feature validation-table blind spots.
The auto workflow validation activities are structural/link/count checks, narrower than per-feature source/test table quality needs.
feature_catalog_creation.md honestly documents current validator limits at root-doc level and manual per-feature source-anchor review.
sk-doc README has broad quality-pipeline language that can overlead for feature-catalog table semantics, while SKILL success criteria require known validator limits to be stated honestly.
